name: A Study to Evaluate the Effects of the Combination of GI-102 With GIB-7 on Biomarkers of Aging in Healthy Adults and Cancer Survivors
summary: A recruiting phase 2a ClinicalTrials.gov record testing GI-102 plus GIB-7 in healthy adults and cancer survivors, with NK cells, CD8 T cells, safety, physical-function, and microbiome endpoints but no posted results as of June 11, 2026.
